scenario.name: INVITE
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [auto_media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Content-Length: 0

INVITE sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 INVITE Contact: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=- 0 0 IN IP4 [local_ip] s=Test c=IN IP4 [local_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [auto_media_port] RTP/AVP 0 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000

ACK sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 ACK Content-Length: 0

BYE sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:caller@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:test@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]>[peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 3 BYE Content-Length: 0
